conclusion: On short deterministic command-gen tasks, opus-4-6 is reliably FASTER (median 17.0s vs 23.9s; paired t~4, p<0.005). This REVERSES the v2 finding (4.8 faster on the HARD task). Latency ranking depends on task difficulty: 4.6 is snappier on easy tasks, 4.8 faster on hard ones (4.6 appears to spend more thinking on hard problems). Accuracy identical (both perfect) so v3 does not discriminate on correctness.
